allow: Bash(git add experiment.go && git commit -m "experiment: increase LR to 1e-3")
Bash(cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/autoresearch-go-ane/.claude/worktrees/main-clean && DATA=tinystories_data00.bin go test -bench . -benchtime 5x -count 3 -v 2>&1 | tee bench_latest.txt)

Bash(cd /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/autoresearch-go-ane/.claude/worktrees/main-clean && ln -s /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/maderix/ANE/training/tinystories_data00.bin . && ln -s /Volumes/tmc/go/src/github.com/tmc/autoresearch-go-ane/stories110M.bin . && ls -la tinystories_data00.bin stories110M.bin)

Bash(git reset HEAD .
git status --short | wc -l)

Bash(git reset HEAD -- . 2>&1 | tail -5
git status --short 2>&1 | wc -l)
Bash(go build ./... 2>&1 && go vet ./... 2>&1 && echo "BUILD+VET PASS")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ane: add GQA MIL generator and residual-scale MIL programs

Add Grouped-Query Attention \(GQA\) MIL program generator for models
where KV heads < Q heads \(e.g., Qwen3-4B: 32 Q heads, 8 KV heads\).
KV heads are tiled to match Q head count before attention computation.

Update MIL program generators to accept residualScale parameter for
models that use post-normalization residual scaling.

Includes tests for MHA fallback, GQA tiling, and edge cases.
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add ane/kvcache.go ane/eval_cached.go ane/eval_cached_other.go && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ane: add KV cache and cached single-token inference

Add KVCache for incremental autoregressive generation, storing
key/value tensors per layer to avoid recomputation.

Add EvalNextToken for single-token inference using the KV cache,
with per-component timing breakdown \(qkv, attention, wo, ffn,
classifier, fp16 conversion\).
EOF
\)")
Bash(git add ane/generate.go ane/decode.go && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ane: add autoregressive generation and token decoding

Add Generate and GenerateStream for autoregressive text generation
with KV-cached inference. GenerateStream yields tokens via callback
for streaming output.

Add decode utilities for detokenization \(BPE byte-pair merging,
special token handling, whitespace normalization\).
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add ane/bnns_darwin.go ane/bnns_other.go ane/metal_darwin.go ane/metal_darwin.m ane/metal_other.go ane/fp16_pack_darwin.go ane/fp16_pack_stub.go ane/layer_tiled_darwin.go ane/moe_layer_darwin.go ane/residual.go ane/capability_darwin.go ane/diagnostics.go ane/dynamic_status.go ane/dynamic_status_darwin.go ane/dynamic_status_other.go && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ane: add Metal, BNNS, FP16, tiled layers, and MoE dispatch

Add hardware acceleration backends:
- BNNS fp16-weight GEMV for memory-bandwidth-bound inference
- Metal MPS GPU matmul for large models
- NEON fp16/fp32 conversion for weight compression

Add tiled ANE layer forward for models exceeding single-dispatch
surface limits \(Qwen3-4B\).

Add MoE expert dispatch with top-k gating for Qwen3-Coder-Next.

Add runtime capability detection and diagnostics.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add ane/engine.go ane/common.go ane/accel_darwin.go ane/accel_other.go ane/layer_darwin.go ane/layer_dynamic_darwin.go ane/offload_darwin.go ane/offload_other.go ane/backward_darwin.go ane/backward_other.go ane/runtime.go ane/train_full.go ane/train_util.go ane/adam_accel_darwin.go ane/adam_accel_stub.go ane/gemm_accel_darwin.go ane/gemm_accel_stub.go ane/grad_ops_accel_darwin.go ane/grad_ops_stub.go ane/grad_tasks_other.go ane/parallel_other.go && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
ane: thread ModelConfig through engine, add platform stubs

Update Engine to use ModelConfig for flexible model dimensions,
GQA head counts, and explicit head_dim. Support int32 token IDs
throughout for Qwen3's 151K vocabulary.

Add Accelerate BLAS helpers \(sgemv, siluMul, Adam\), GEMM wrappers,
and gradient ops with darwin/stub pairs for cross-platform builds.

Update layer forward to support GQA, tiled dispatch, and dynamic
MIL program selection based on model config.
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "ane: thread ModelConfig through engine, add platform stubs

Update Engine to use ModelConfig for flexible model dimensions,
GQA head counts, and explicit head_dim. Support int32 token IDs
throughout for Qwen3 151K vocabulary.

Add Accelerate BLAS helpers \(sgemv, siluMul, Adam\), GEMM wrappers,
and gradient ops with darwin/stub pairs for cross-platform builds.

Update layer forward to support GQA, tiled dispatch, and dynamic
MIL program selection based on model config.")

Bash(git add cmd/generate/main.go scripts/convert_hf.py scripts/convert_hf_moe.py scripts/tokenize.py scripts/profile_4b.sh scripts/bench_infer.sh scripts/parse_bench.py scripts/coordinator.py && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "cmd/generate: add text generation CLI with profiling

Add generate command for autoregressive text generation supporting
TinyStories, Qwen3-0.6B, and Qwen3-4B models. Includes CPU/memory
profiling flags and Go-native BPE tokenization.

Add model conversion scripts \(HuggingFace dense and MoE\), profiling
suite, benchmark parsing, and experiment coordinator.")
Bash(git add bench_test.go correctness_test.go experiment.go harness.go main_other.go go.mod go.sum CLAUDE.md && git diff --cached --stat)

Bash(git commit -m "all: update top-level harness for Qwen3, add correctness oracle

Update bench_test.go and experiment.go for int32 tokens and
ModelConfig-based engine initialization.

Add correctness_test.go for golden-logit regression testing with
fp16 tolerance.

Update CLAUDE.md with Qwen3 usage, profiling, and project structure.")
